name: cpig-bool-refactor-02-intersection-libfive
description: CPigIntersection of sphere + box (both libfive). Exercises field_binary_impl op=1 (max) via libfive fast path → Kind::LIBFIVE result. Phase 1 left this path unchanged. The expected SDF is the rounded-edge cube where the sphere clips the box corners. Visual: rounded cube. If Phase 1 broke libfive composition, no frame presents and the gate times out.

checkpoints.name: intersection-libfive
checkpoints.description: Sphere (r=15) intersected with box (24-unit cube). Result is a rounded cube (sphere clips box corners). Libfive ∩ libfive fast path; ONE tape atom.
